title: EMPLOYMENT SERVICES - 211info
text: THE DPI GROUP EMPLOYMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides temporary and full-time employment opportunities for individuals facing employment barriers. 4950 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Age 18 and older People with disabilities, veterans, those experiencing homelessness, and those with justice system involvement Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3pm Email (503) 281-1289 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 281-1289 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information and to apply for jobs. A staff member will call qualified candidates to move them forward in the application process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Two forms of I-9 approved identification e.g., government-issued photo ID and a Social Security card AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 6, 72 Services: Comprehensive Disability Related Employment Programs Ex-Offender Employment Programs Job Finding Assistance * Homelessness Issues Job Finding Assistance * Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE DPI GROUP
